features.title: Family Setup in Under 3 Minutes
features.summary: Create your family, add members, and pair devices with a PIN.

features.title: Day View — Your Family's Timeline
features.summary: A clean, vertical timeline grouped by category with completion tracking.

features.title: The Satisfying Completion Toggle
features.summary: Per-member task completion with a delightful micro-animation.

features.title: Quick Add — 3 Taps to Schedule
features.summary: Add items to the calendar faster than writing a sticky note.

features.title: Smart Recurrence
features.summary: Visual recurrence picker with live preview of next 5 occurrences.

features.title: Week at a Glance
features.summary: 7-day strip with completion dots and tap-to-view navigation.

features.title: Month Overview
features.summary: Traditional month grid with dot indicators for busy days.

features.title: Family Management
features.summary: Add, remove, and manage family members and paired devices.

features.title: Night Mode — Calm in the Dark
features.summary: True black display with a warm clock — designed for OLED screens at night.

features.title: Seamless Local Sync
features.summary: Automatic device discovery and sub-second sync over your home WiFi.

features.title: Gentle Notifications
features.summary: Configurable reminders, daily summaries, and quiet hours.

features.title: Display Mode — Dedicated Family Display
features.summary: Turn any device into a child-safe family command center.
